lines: # Release History
-## 1.2.0-beta.2 (Unreleased)
### Features Added
-### Breaking Changes
-### Bugs Fixed
+- Updated the api-version to 2024-04-01-preview.
### Other Changes
+- Upgraded dependent Azure.Core to 1.57.0.
+- Upgraded dependent Azure.ResourceManager to 1.14.0.
### Features Added
